---
title: "Week 3"
subtitle: "Surveys"
---

## Prepare

📖 Read Ch. 2 of National Household Travel Survey Documentation [NHTS](https://github.com/UNL-Hawkins-Lab/CIVE_461/blob/6ae2e8ca1576a517b809c1d6ffb832f84695dbf1/Resources/Gelman_Et_Al_ROS_1ed.pdf)

📖 Read Chioce Experiments (2017) [CE2017](https://github.com/UNL-Hawkins-Lab/CIVE_461/blob/6ae2e8ca1576a517b809c1d6ffb832f84695dbf1/Resources/Gelman_Et_Al_ROS_1ed.pdf)

## Participate

🖥️ [Lecture 2 - Surveys](/teaching/ENCI707/slides/lec-2.html)

## Practice

📋 [Activity 3 - Stated Preference Experiment](/teaching/ENCI707/ae/ae-3.html)

<br><br>

::: {style="font-size: 0.875em;"}
Back to [course schedule](/teaching/ENCI707/ "Course schedule") ⏎
:::
